ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of data collection */,
  "wet_bulb_temp" REAL /* Wet bulb temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "dew_point_temp" REAL /* Dew point temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "station_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea-level pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount in inches */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Method or source of data collection */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Numerical score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data was collected */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data (e.g., raw, processed, validated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_data_status FOREIGN KEY ("data_status") REFERENCES data_quality_rules ("rule_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the weather type */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for this weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather type */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_weather_types" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number to uniquely identify each version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_versions_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was created */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the flag */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the flag */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_flags_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to evaluate data quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)
